title: Sterling TML130BP Internal 3" / 75mm Brass Tubular Mortice Latch, 10 Pack, Nickel
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Pack of 10 75mm 3.0" Brass Tubular Mortice Latches
Sprung high quality latch for effortless operation
Suitable for commercial and domestic use
Brass finish including striker plate & screws
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Sterling offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s one of the largest safe and post box manufacturer Sterling TML130 Indoor Tubular Mortise Latch - 10 Pack Brass - 75mm - 3.0" The Sterling 75mm 3.0" brass tubular mortice latch is designed to fit the majority of handles or door knobs, either as replacement or new fit. It is supplied with the striker plate and fixing screws. It uses a sprung high quality latch for effortless operation and can be used in domestic or commercial doors. Also avaliable in 63MM 2.5" option with chrome nickel and brass finish in both.
